validationFailedHint: Check required fields (email, photos, license date, and at least one car).
connectionDbDown: API is up but MongoDB is not connected. Start MongoDB or fix MONGODB_URI on the server.
connectionApiDown: Cannot reach API at {{url}}. (1) Run the backend on your PC. (2) Phone and PC must use the same Wi‑Fi (not mobile data). (3) On Windows: run backend/scripts/allow-api-port-windows.ps1 as Administrator. Try {{url}}/health in Safari. (4) Router AP/client isolation can block devices on the same Wi‑Fi. (5) iPhone + Expo Go: Settings → Privacy & Security → Local Network → turn Expo Go ON.
connectionApiProxyHint: Proxy (:8090): run npm run api-proxy or npm run dev:lan from repo root. Firewall: allow-api-port-windows.ps1 -Port 8090. Alternative: in mobile/.env set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_FULL_URL=http://YOUR_LAN_IP:3000 and allow TCP 3000 (skip proxy).
connectionDbDownShort: Database unavailable — check MongoDB on your PC.
connectionApiDownShort: Can't reach the API. Run the backend and use the same Wi‑Fi as your computer.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to book rides or go online as a driver.
name: Name
bookingSeatsIntro: How many people travel with you, and what size category best describes the group (affects seat space).
bookingVehicleCapacityHint: Max {{n}} seat units for this vehicle
bookingSeatsRemainingPreview: After booking, about {{remaining}} of {{total}} units remain in the vehicle
bookingOverCapacity: Not enough seat units for this vehicle. Reduce passengers or pick a larger category / vehicle.
bookingSeatsLowWarning: Only partial seats remain — larger passengers may not fit.
tapMapInstructions: Tap map: first tap pickup, second tap destination.
adminWebPanelHint: Same server URL as the app. Open in your phone or desktop browser (same Wi‑Fi / LAN).
rtlHint: RTL may require a one-time reload after switching language.
passengerMinFareSectionHint: Not below the suggested {{suggested}}. You can raise it while searching for a driver.
passengerUpdateMinWhileWaiting: While waiting, you can raise your minimum offer (not below the suggested fare).
passengerMinBelowSuggested: Your minimum cannot be below the suggested fare.
passengerAwaitingDriverConfirm: Waiting for the driver to confirm the trip
passengerAwaitingDriverConfirmSub: You accepted their price of {{amount}}. They can accept or decline the booking.
driverDeclinedBookingBody: The driver did not confirm this trip. You can wait for another offer.
driverPassengerAcceptedPriceSub: They agreed to {{amount}}. Confirm if you want this trip, or decline.
driverAwaitingPassengerOnOffer: Offer sent — waiting for the passenger to accept or reject.
driverOfferRejectedBody: The passenger rejected your price. You can send another offer if the ride is still available.
driverOfferModalHint: The passenger will see this amount and can accept or reject.
driverOfferBelowPassengerMin: Your offer must be at least {{amount}} (passenger minimum / suggested fare).
driverOfferListOnlyActive: This list is empty because your current request is shown above while you wait for the passenger.
mapLockedHint: Map selection is locked while a ride is in progress.
locationPermission: Location permission is needed to show your position on the map.
ridePhaseWaitingDriver: Looking for a driver… Your request is on the map.
ridePhaseDriverAccepted: Driver accepted — they are on the way to pickup.
ridePhaseTracking: Trip in progress — live tracking on the map.
driverPhaseGoPickup: Accepted — go to pickup, then start trip.
driverPhaseTrip: Trip in progress — follow the route.
rateFailed: Could not send rating. Check connection and try again.
ratePickStars: Tap stars to rate your trip
pullToRefreshDrivers: Pull down to refresh driver count.
helpIntro: Quick answers about requests, drivers, and ratings in this demo app.
helpQ1: How do I request a ride?
helpA1: Tap once for pickup, again for destination, then Request ride. Nearby drivers appear on the map before you book.
helpQ2: Why does my ride stay pending?
helpA2: A driver must be online and accept your trip. Pull to refresh and ensure location permission is enabled.
helpA3: After a trip ends you can rate your driver once. Fair ratings help everyone on WERET.
safetyIntro: A few habits that keep every trip safer:
safetyPoint1: Confirm pickup and destination pins before you start.
safetyPoint2: Share live trip details with someone you trust while the ride is ongoing.
safetyPoint3: Check that driver and vehicle details in the app match in real life.
safetyPoint4: Use in-app actions to end the trip if something feels wrong.
aboutTagline: WERET connects passengers and drivers with simple booking and live tracking.
aboutBody: This build is for development and demo. Features may change as we improve reliability and coverage.
savedIntro: Save frequent pickup or drop-off points for faster booking.
savedEmpty: Saving places will be enabled in a future update.
rideTipsIntro: Follow these steps for a smooth booking:
rideTip1: Allow location so WERET can center the map on you.
rideTip2: First tap on the map sets pickup; second tap sets destination.
rideTip3: Tap Request ride when both points are set and the map is not locked by an active trip.
rideTip4: After a driver accepts, watch them approach on the map; a light vibration reminds you while the trip is in progress.
notificationsLocalHint: These switches apply on this device only (demo).
driverInsightsIntro: In this demo, trips are matched when you are online and accept requests.
driverInsightsBody: Stay where demand is higher, keep location permission on, and pull to refresh the available list while waiting. Mock drivers move on the map for testing. Real earnings dashboards will ship in a production release.
adminToolsIntro: Operators will use this area for exports and audits.
adminToolsBody: CSV export, filtered ride tables, and user audit logs are planned. Use Users and Rides tabs to inspect live data from the dashboard.
featureDriverTripFlowSubtitle: Accept, start, end, and live tracking
featureDriverEarningsPageSubtitle: How money works in this build
driverFlowIntro: End-to-end flow for drivers in WERET (demo). Follow the same order on every trip.
driverFlowStep1: Go online so your location is sent to the server and pending rides appear in the list.
driverFlowStep2: Accept a ride from the list — pickup and destination pins appear on the map with the route line.
driverFlowStep3: Drive to pickup; when the passenger is with you, tap Start trip. The passenger sees you as “ongoing” on their map.
driverFlowStep4: During the trip the map can show the passenger’s live position when they share location; follow the route to the drop-off.
driverFlowStep5: Tap End trip at the destination, then the passenger can rate you. Pull History to review completed rides.
driverFlowFooter: If the map feels crowded, zoom out; the panel below the map lists actions for the active ride.
driverEarningsIntro: WERET shows estimated fare on ride cards where the backend provides it. Payouts and bank details are not wired in this build.
driverEarningsBody1: Each completed trip should appear in History with status and fare when available. Use it as a reference for how pricing might look in production.
driverEarningsBody2: Peak demand, distance, and time can all affect final numbers once a billing engine is connected.
driverEarningsFooter: Weekly statements and instant cash-out will be added in a future driver wallet release.
driverDemandIntro: The home map shows your position, pending pickups on the list, and yellow pins for open requests when you are online.
driverDemandBody1: Pull to refresh the available-rides list when you wait in one spot. Moving slightly can help after a simulation refresh if nothing appears.
driverDemandBody2: When you accept, the map auto-fits pickup, destination, passenger live location (if shared), and your GPS so you keep context at a glance.
driverDemandFooter: Going offline stops location updates and hides you from new passenger matching in this demo.
driverVehicleIntro: Keep your profile and vehicle data accurate. Verification will unlock here in a future update.
driverVehicleFooter: Uploads and admin review will be available once the fleet module ships.
driverRatingsIntro: Passengers rate after each trip. Strong service keeps you trusted on WERET.
driverRatingsPoint1: Confirm identity politely; match the name shown in the app when possible.
driverRatingsPoint2: Keep the car clean, climate reasonable, and music low unless the passenger asks.
driverRatingsPoint3: Follow the route on the map; ask before major detours.
driverRatingsPoint4: End the trip only after a safe stop at the agreed drop-off.
inAppCallNeedsDevBuild: Free in-app calls require a dev build (WebRTC). Expo Go doesn't support it. For now you can use the normal phone call button.
phoneMissingHint: The other person has not added a phone number yet. Ask them to save a number in Settings, or use chat.
phoneMissingShort: No phone on file for calls — use chat.
rideChatClosed: This trip is finished — chat is read-only.
driverRegEmailMismatch: This email differs from your account email. Update your email in Settings, then try again.
selectVehicleBeforeRequest: Select a service type before requesting a ride.
passengerWeretSub: Premium rides and delivery — clear pricing, simple steps.
weretOnboardStoryBody: Premium and prestige car daily trip. pay lower price
phoneLoginSubtitle: Enter your phone number. We'll send a verification code.
phoneLoginHint: Use your mobile number with country code (e.g. +966… or 01… for Egypt).
weretGoogleSoonBody: This option will be available in a future update. Please use email for now.
weretGoogleInitializing: Google sign-in is still initializing. Wait a moment and try again.
weretGoogleNotConfigured: Google is not configured. Set GOOGLE_OAUTH_* on the server and/or EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_* in mobile/.env. Add the app redirect URI in Google Cloud (e.g. weret:/oauthredirect).
weretGoogleNoIdToken: Could not read an ID token from Google. Try again.
weretGoogleServerDisabled: Google sign-in is turned off on the server. Set GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID (and related vars) in backend/.env and restart the API.
weretGoogleDevHint: Google is not set up yet — follow the steps below or use Continue with phone.
weretGoogleSetupSteps:
1) Google Cloud → APIs & Services → Library → enable Google Identity Services API.
2) Configure OAuth consent screen.
3) Credentials → OAuth Web + Android clients.
4) Set GOOGLE_OAUTH_WEB_CLIENT_ID in backend/.env and EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID in mobile/.env.
5) Restart API and Expo.
weretGoogleApisConsole:
Enable Google APIs:
• APIs & Services → Library → Google Identity Services API → Enable
• OAuth consent screen → complete setup; add your Gmail as a test user (Testing)
• Credentials → create Web + Android OAuth clients
Then paste Client IDs into backend/.env and mobile/.env
weretGoogleRedirectMismatch:
Redirect URI not registered.
Add to Google Cloud → Web client → Redirect URIs:
{{uri}}
Also: weret:/oauthredirect and com.ridehail.app:/oauthredirect
weretGoogleInvalidClient: Invalid client ID. Use the Web client ID in .env, not the Android client ID for web fields.
orTapMapForPickup: Or tap the map to set pickup.
tapMapForDestination: After pickup, tap the map to set destination.
fareNeedsPickupAndDestination: Set pickup and destination to see distance; choose a service for the fare.
fareDependsOnRouteAndVehicle: Fare = base fare + (km × per-km rate) for the selected service.
tapMapShort: Map: first tap pickup, second destination.
tapMapShortLinked: Choose pickup or destination card below, then tap the map on that point.
mapLegendToPickupPassenger: Orange line: driver heading to pickup · dashed: full trip preview
mapLegendTripPassenger: Blue line: route to your destination
mapLegendToPickupDriver: Orange: your path to pickup · dashed: passenger trip preview
mapTapAppliesToPickup: Taps on the map now move pickup.
mapTapAppliesToDestination: Taps on the map now move destination.
placeSearchByNameHint: Or type a place name and pick a suggestion.
placeSearchInputPlaceholder: Search pickup — address or place name
placeSearchDestinationHint: Search destination by name, or use the map button below.
placeSearchDestinationPlaceholder: Search destination — address or place name
destinationMapTapHint: Or tap the map (choose destination mode first)
pickupSetTapDestinationCard: Pickup set — next map tap sets destination (or open the destination section below).
destinationLockedUntilPickup: Set pickup first; then choose destination.
tapDestinationCardForMap: Tap the destination row, then tap the map for drop-off.
setPickupBeforeDestination: Set pickup first (pickup card + map or GPS).
requestRideNeedPickup: Set pickup on the map or use GPS.
requestRideNeedDestination: Select the destination card, then tap the map for drop-off.
requestRideHintPickup: Set pickup (card + map or «Use my location») to enable the button.
requestRideHintDestination: Select destination card and tap the map to enable the button.
destinationSearchPlaceholder: Where to — and what is the fare?
driverVehicleClassHint: You only receive ride requests that match this class.
driverPassengerModeBody: To use the passenger app, log out and sign in with a passenger account. Role switching from here is not enabled in this demo.
roleSwitchHint: Switching changes your active mode only; driver data stays isolated and hidden in passenger mode.
driverFeatureSoon: This action will be available in a future update.
driverApplyHint: Apply for requests that match your vehicle class. Pull to refresh the list often while online.
driverOrdersEmptySub: Stay online and match your vehicle type with passenger requests.
driverClearFiltersHint: Clear the A/B fields or adjust the text.
driverWalletHelp: Balance and payouts are a demo. Production will connect a real wallet.
tripsMapHint: Tap a ride below to show its route on the map.
driverMenuTripsMapSubtitle: Active and past rides with map
driverRatingsPerTripIntro: Passenger ratings after each completed trip:
paymentMethodsIntro: Choose your preferred payout or top-up method for later.
paymentMethodsFooter: Live payouts (Stripe, PayPal, local wallets) require backend keys and local compliance.
driverChooseVehicleSubtitle: Choose the vehicle class you offer. You only see matching requests.
driverMyCarsSubtitle: Manage cars and set your active vehicle.
driverMyCarsApprovedHint: Choose an active car before going online. You can add multiple cars.
driverMyCarsPendingHint: You can add cars now; going online requires approval + an active car.
driverCarsOnlineWarning: You are online. Some edits may be restricted.
driverNoCarsYet: No cars yet. Add one to continue.
driverCarFormMissing: Please fill all fields (image URL, brand, model, color, plate, seats).
driverOnboardingStep1Body: Complete the steps to add documents and vehicle details. This is a demo: real uploads will be enabled later.
driverOnboardingOptionalHint: The back of the certificate is optional in this demo.
driverOnboardingScanBody: Photo upload and document verification will be available in a future update.
walletSimulatedDisclaimer: Demo wallet only — no real money moves.
walletNoMethods: No wallet methods yet. Add one to deposit or withdraw.
walletFillFields: Enter amount and select an account.
walletWithdrawOtpHint: We send a demo code. In production this would be your PSP or SMS OTP.
adminTransactionsMenuSubtitle: View ledger activity and flag for review.
adminAuditSubtitle: Every admin decision is recorded here.
reportSubmitted: Thanks — our team will review this report.
driverRegStep1Sub: Add your contact info and a profile photo.
driverRegStep2Sub: Upload your criminal record (front + back) and enter your national ID number.
driverRegStep3Sub: Upload your license and fill in its details.
driverRegStep4Sub: Upload a car photo and fill in the car information.
driverRegAddCarHint: Fill the form below then tap to add.
driverRegSubmittedPending: Your driver registration was submitted. Status: pending approval.
driverRegCompletedApproved: Registration complete. You are now an approved driver.
driverRegCompletedPending: Registration submitted. Your driver profile is pending admin approval.
driverRegPendingTitle: Your driver account is under review
driverRegPendingBody: You can edit your submission, but you cannot go online until approved.
driverRegRejectedBody: Review the note below, update your information, and resubmit.
driverRegErrCriminalDocs: Criminal record front and back are required.
driverRegErrNationalId: Enter a valid national ID number.
driverRegErrLicenseExpiry: Enter a valid future expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD).
driverRegErrCarSpec: Car brand and model are required.
driverRegErrCars: Add at least one car and select it.
becomeDriverSubtitle: Complete registration and wait for admin approval.
